editor.shortcuts: Su dung:   [phim Mui ten],   [phim SPACE],   [phim N],   [phim ENTER]

work_env.title: Ban thich cai nao hon?
work_env.msg_1: Ban chon 'Color background'. Neu chuot cua ban bien mat, hay su dung lenh {45aaf2}/mouse
work_env.msg_2: Ban chon 'Spawn Player'. Neu chuot cua ban bien mat, hay su dung lenh {45aaf2}/mouse

page.title: Di toi trang
page.content: {FFFFFF}So trang phai nam trong khoang tu {ff7979}1 {FFFFFF}and {ff7979}%s

reindex.title: Sap xep lai cac so thu tu
reindex.content_1: {ffffff}Dieu nay se sap xep lai so thu tu cua ban thanh {f1c40f}"0, 1, 2, 3" {ffffff}neu so thu tu cua ban giong nhu {f1c40f}"0, 1, 2, 4"
reindex.content_2: {e74c3c}Canh bao: {ffffff}Thao tac nay se xoa du lieu hoan tac va lam lai. Ban co muon thuc hien thao tac nay khong?
reindex.info: Cac so thu tu da duoc sap xep lai. Chon mot TextDraw de chinh sua TextDraw cua ban.

project.title: Danh muc du an
project.error_name_exists: A project with that name already exists.

project_new.title: Du an moi
project_new.text: {ffffff}Nhap ten cua du an ban muon tao:
project_new.error_1: Ban da khong chi dinh ten du an.
project_new.error_3: Co ky tu khong hop le trong ten du an.
project_new.error_4: Da co mot du an voi ten do.
project_new.error_5: De tao mot du an moi, hay dong du an hien co.

projects.title: Du an [%s / %s]
projects.error: Khong tim thay du an nao.

project_action.title: Tuy chon
project_action.error_1: Du an nay da duoc tai.
project_action.error_2: De tai mot du an moi, hay dong du an hien co.
project_action.error_3: Khong the tai du an vi khong tim thay tep co so du lieu.
project_action.info: Du an "%s" {FFFFFF}da duoc tai. [Global TDs: %s, Player TDs: %s, Total: %s]
project_action.warn_content: {FFFFFF}Ban co chac chan muon xoa du an?
project_action.warn_error: Ban can dong du an truoc.

import.title: Nhap vao
import.content_1: {FFFFFF}Nhap ten cua tep ban muon nhap.
import.error_1: Ban can tao mot du an truoc khi nhap TextDraw.
import.error_2: Ban chua nhap ten tep can nhap.
import.error_3: Khong tim thay tep voi ten "%s".
import.error_4: Qua trinh nhap bi gian doan vi da dat den gioi han TextDraw.
import.error_5: Khong co TextDraw duoc tim thay de nhap.
import.info: Tep "%s" da duoc nhap. [Global TDs: %s, Player TDs: %s, Total: %s]

export.title: Xuat ra
export.content_1: {FFFFFF}Nhap ten cua tep ban muon xuat.
export.content_2: Neu ban khong chi dinh ten tep, ban se nhan duoc ket qua la "%s.txt".
export.error: Ban da khong tao bat ky TextDraw nao.
export.error2: Ban phai tao hoac tai mot du an cho quy trinh xuat.
export.info: Du an "%s.txt" da duoc xuat. [Global TDs: %s, Player TDs: %s, Total: %s]

close_project.error: De dong mot du an, ban phai tai mot du an.
close_project.info: Du an %s da dong thanh cong.

time.title: Gio
time.info: Thoi gian trong tro choi duoc dat thanh %s:00.

hud_position.info: Vi tri HUD da thay doi thanh cong.

var_global.title: Ten bien mac dinh
var_global.content_1: {FFFFFF}Chi dinh ten bien cua dau ra ma ban se nhan duoc khi xuat du an cua minh.
var_global.content_2: {FFFFFF}De trong man hinh de dat ten bien mac dinh.
var_global.info: Ten bien mac dinh duoc dat thanh %s.

undo_redo_confirm.info_2: Khong co thay doi nao duoc thuc hien.

interactive.start: Arrow keys: {0}. ENTER: save. N: manual.
interactive.start_pmodel: Arrow keys: change value. ENTER: save. N: manual.
interactive.start_undo: LEFT/RIGHT: browse. ENTER: confirm. N: jump.
interactive.start_swap: LEFT/RIGHT: swap. ENTER: confirm. N: manual.
interactive.start_gpos: Arrow keys: move grouped. ENTER: save.
